response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically strong individual contributor with nearly 20 years of software development experience and genuine depth in developer tooling, test infrastructure, and CI/CD systems. However, the role is fundamentally a people leadership position requiring demonstrated people management and organizational change experience, neither of which appears anywhere in the resume. There is no mention of direct reports, performance reviews, hiring, or team leadership beyond a Staff IC title. Without this foundation, he does not meet the minimum qualifications for a Level II Engineering Manager role.
strengths: Deep developer tooling experience including CI/CD infrastructure, test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), MCP generators, and GitLab/Artifactory administration
Broad technical breadth across backend, frontend, mobile (iOS/Apple TV), embedded, and GIS domains spanning nearly two decades
Demonstrated community knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and open-source maintainership, indicating some mentorship aptitude
concerns: Zero evidence of people management: no direct reports, no performance reviews, no hiring or firing, no org chart responsibility mentioned across any role
No indication of strategic roadmap ownership or cross-team alignment at organizational scale; all work appears individual or small-team execution
No experience leading organizational change, a preferred but also practically implied requirement for a mid-to-senior management role at this level

key_factors.factor: No organizational leadership or roadmap ownership
